LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED FROM JAN-06-2015 TO JAN-27-2015, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 6, 2015 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER THE PARTIES ENTERED INTO A CREDIT CARD AGREEMENT. (GIRON DEC., 2:14-16; PLAINTIFFS' DEC., 1:25). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Defendant RUFINO R. RIMANDO, Tel No. (415) 713-1027 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NAVY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. There is a triable issue of material fact regarding whether the parties entered into a credit card agreement. (Giron dec., 2:14-16; Plaintiffs' dec., 1:25). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Continued To Jan-27-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NAVY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to January 27, 2015 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 6, 2015 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF NAVY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is off calendar as a duplicate entry. (302/EHG)
